ops.title: Hoist cc-present's procs.go Claude-ancestor walk into cc-interact
ops.description: The three-repo channelsetup audit (2026-07-17) flagged cc-present's internal/procs (ClaudePID / LiveClaude ancestor-process walk) as duplicated-pattern code that other cc-interact consumers re-implement for cmd.Deps wiring (ClaudePID, WindowAlive). Evaluate hoisting it into cc-interact so consumers stop hand-rolling the walk. Note-only finding; scope and API to be designed.

ops.text: the ancestor-walk helpers live in cc-interact (or the hoist is rejected with a recorded reason)
at least one consumer's cmd.Deps wiring uses the hoisted helpers with its local copy deleted
